vocab.sentence: I don't know the answer to the question.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我不知道這個問題的答案。

vocab.sentence: Can I ask a question?
He is in trouble now.
Music is a big part of my life.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 音樂是我生活的一大部分。

vocab.sentence: An owl is a bird that stays up late.
Wash your face before you go to bed.
I usually eat breakfast at seven.
We have lunch at school every day.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我們每天在學校吃午餐。

vocab.sentence: He uses the computer for work.
I am always happy at school.
He is often tired after school.
I take a shower every night.
We never fight with each other.
I go to the library once a week.
I visit my grandma once a month.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我每個月看望奶奶一次。

vocab.sentence: We exercise twice a day.
It's about ten o'clock now.
He gets up early in the morning.
My dad goes to work by car.
How often do you watch TV?
I usually go to bed at ten.
They are seldom quiet in class.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 他們在課堂上很少安靜。

vocab.sentence: She sometimes walks her dog at night.
He is even busy on weekends.
Don't be late for school.
I study for one hour every day.
Wait a minute, please.
They study English together.
He exercises twice a day.
I go to school by bike.

phrases.sentence: I play basketball with friends.
We clean the house on weekends.
He watches TV after dinner.
I like to listen to music.
I brush my teeth every morning.
You can check out books here.
By the way, what's your name?
phrases.sentence_chinese: 順帶一提，你叫什麼名字？

phrases.sentence: I eat too much; I can't help it.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 我吃太多了；我控制不了。

phrases.sentence: She does her homework at home.
I go to cram school after school.
They never fight with each other.
The dog sleeps under the sofa.

phrases.phrase: help their dad in the kitchen
phrases.sentence: The girls help their dad in the kitchen.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 女孩們在廚房幫她們的爸爸。

phrases.sentence: He walks the dog every evening.

tips.label: Be 動詞句型
tips.text: 主詞 + be 動詞 + 頻率副詞

tips.label: 一般動詞句型
tips.text: 主詞 + 頻率副詞 + 一般動詞

tips.label: 問頻率句型
tips.text: How often + do/does + 主詞 + 原形動詞?

notes.title: 頻率百分比
notes.rule: Always(100%) > Usually > Often > Sometimes(50%) > Seldom > Never(0%)
notes.description: Seldom 與 Never 具否定意義，不與 not 連用。

notes.title: 位置口訣
notes.description: 放在 Be 動詞後面，一般動詞前面。

notes.title: 回答 How often
notes.rule: 次數 + a + 時間 / Every + 時間

quiz.question: I ________ eat breakfast at six.
quiz.hint: 一般動詞前放頻率副詞。

quiz.question: She ________ walks her dog at night.
quiz.hint: 動詞前放 sometimes。

quiz.question: They ________ quiet in class.
quiz.hint: Be 動詞 are 後面放頻率副詞。

quiz.question: ________ do you go to the library?
quiz.hint: 問頻率使用 How often。

quiz.question: I go to the library ________ a week.
quiz.hint: 一週一次使用 once a week。

quiz.question: He ________ tired after school.
quiz.hint: Be 動詞 is 後面放 often。

quiz.question: We ________ fight with each other.
quiz.hint: fight 是動詞，never 放動前。

quiz.question: How often ________ he watch TV?
quiz.hint: 主詞 he 是單數，助動詞用 does。

quiz.question: The bus comes ________ thirty minutes.
quiz.hint: every thirty minutes 每 30 分鐘。

quiz.question: An owl ________ stays up late.
quiz.hint: stays 是動詞，頻率副詞放前面。

quiz.question: Do you ________ use the computer?
quiz.hint: 疑問句中，頻率副詞放在主詞後。

quiz.question: He visits the cram school ________ a day.
quiz.hint: 一天兩次慣用 twice。

quiz.question: My life ________ full of music.
quiz.hint: Be 動詞後面放 always。

quiz.question: I ________ have trouble with math.
quiz.hint: have 是動詞，seldom 放前面。

quiz.question: A: Does he brush his teeth? B: Yes, ________.
quiz.hint: 簡答句中，頻率副詞放在助動詞之前。

quiz.question: How often ________ the girls help their dad?
quiz.hint: 主詞 the girls 是複數，用 do。

quiz.question: We check out books ________ a month.
quiz.hint: 三次以上用數字 + times。

quiz.question: By the way, are you ________ late?
quiz.hint: Be 動詞 are 後面直接接 often。

quiz.question: My dad is very busy. He ________ early.
quiz.hint: get up 是動詞，頻率副詞放前面。

quiz.question: It's ________ ten o'clock.
quiz.hint: about ten o'clock 大約十點。

quiz.question: The dog ________ sleeps under the sofa.
quiz.hint: sleeps 是動詞，放動前。

quiz.question: I ________ my face every morning.
quiz.hint: 頻率副詞 + 一般動詞。

quiz.question: A: How often do you exercise? B: ________.
quiz.hint: 問 How often 用次數回答。

quiz.question: They ________ quiet in the library.
quiz.hint: Be 動詞 + 頻率副詞。

quiz.question: I ________ eat lunch at home.
quiz.hint: never 放動詞 have/eat 之前。

quiz.question: My mother ________ in the kitchen.
quiz.hint: Be 動詞後接頻率副詞。

quiz.question: How often ________ your brother play the computer?
quiz.hint: 單數主詞用 does。

quiz.question: I ________ have breakfast. I'm never hungry.
quiz.hint: 語意為「很少」，故選 seldom。

quiz.question: We study for two ________ every day.
quiz.hint: 讀書兩「小時」。

quiz.question: A: Is she happy? B: Yes, she ________ is.
quiz.hint: 肯定回答通常配合高的頻率。

quiz.question: He ________ gets up early on weekends.
quiz.hint: 頻率副詞放一般動詞前。

quiz.question: ________, what time is it now?
quiz.hint: 「順帶一提」的片語。

quiz.question: I can't ________ it. I love chocolate!
quiz.hint: I can't help it. 我沒辦法（控制）。

quiz.question: How often do you ________ the house?
quiz.hint: clean the house 打掃房子。

quiz.question: The girls ________ tired after school.
quiz.hint: Be 動詞後接頻率副詞。

quiz.question: A: How often do they exercise? B: ________.
quiz.hint: 回答頻率需完整的次數與時間單位。

quiz.question: My life is ________ trouble.
quiz.hint: in trouble 有麻煩。

quiz.question: He ________ his teeth three times a day.
quiz.hint: 動詞前接頻率副詞。

quiz.question: Can you ________ out the books for me?
quiz.hint: check out 借（書）。

quiz.question: I ________ go to cram school.
quiz.hint: 一般動詞 go 之前放 usually。

quiz.question: We ________ listen to music in class.
quiz.hint: 頻率副詞放在 listen 之前。

quiz.question: The bus comes every ________.
quiz.hint: every 後接單數時間單位。

quiz.question: ________ often does she walk the dog?
quiz.hint: How often 問頻率。

quiz.question: My sister is ________ quiet at home.
quiz.hint: Be 動詞後接頻率副詞。

quiz.question: They ________ watch TV before dinner.
quiz.hint: 頻率副詞放在 watch 之前。

quiz.question: Wait a ________. I'm coming!
quiz.hint: Wait a minute. 等一下。

quiz.question: I am ________ late for school. I get up early.
quiz.hint: 因為早起，所以「從不」遲到。

quiz.question: Do you ________ study English?
quiz.hint: 助動詞疑問句中，頻率副詞在主詞後。

quiz.question: I use the ________ to do my homework.
quiz.hint: 使用「電腦」做功課。

quiz.question: How often ________ you wash your face?
quiz.hint: 主詞 you 配助動詞 do。

phrases.sentence: He walks the dog every evening.

grammar.sentence: I usually eat breakfast at six o'clock.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我通常六點吃早餐。

grammar.sentence: She sometimes walks her dog at night.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 她有時候在晚上遛狗。

grammar.sentence: We never fight with each other.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我們從不互相吵架。

grammar.sentence: He is often tired after school.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 他放學後經常很累。

grammar.sentence: They are seldom quiet in class.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 他們在課堂上很少安靜。

grammar.sentence: How often do you go to the library?
grammar.sentence_chinese: 你多常去圖書館？

grammar.sentence: He watches TV three times a week.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 他一週看三次電視。

grammar.sentence: The dog always sleeps under the sofa.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 狗狗總是睡在沙發下。

grammar.sentence: The girls usually help their dad in the kitchen.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 女孩們通常在廚房幫她們的爸爸。

grammar.sentence: We exercise twice a day.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我們一天運動兩次。

grammar.sentence: The bus comes every thirty minutes.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 公車每三十分鐘來一班。

grammar.sentence: How often do the boys clean their bedroom?
grammar.sentence_chinese: 男孩子們多常打掃房間？

grammar.sentence: I am always happy at school.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我在學校總是很快樂。

grammar.sentence: An owl usually stays up late at night.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 貓頭鷹通常在晚上熬夜。

grammar.sentence: Do you often use the computer for work?
grammar.sentence_chinese: 你經常使用電腦工作嗎？

grammar.sentence: My dad usually goes to work by bike.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我爸爸通常騎腳踏車上班。

grammar.sentence: I always wash my face before I go to bed.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我總是睡前洗臉。

grammar.sentence: He often uses the computer for his work.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 他經常為了工作使用電腦。

grammar.sentence: We seldom go to cram school on Sundays.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我們星期日很少去補習班。

grammar.sentence: How often does your sister check out books?
grammar.sentence_chinese: 你姐姐多常借書？

grammar.sentence: They usually play basketball after school.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 他們通常放學後打籃球。

grammar.sentence: I can't help it because I am very hungry.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我沒辦法，因為我很餓。

grammar.sentence: By the way, do you have the answer to the question?
grammar.sentence_chinese: 順帶一提，你知道問題的答案嗎？

grammar.sentence: My life is always full of trouble and fun.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我的生活總是充滿麻煩與樂趣。

grammar.sentence: An owl always stays up late at night.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 貓頭鷹總是熬夜。

grammar.sentence: The bus comes every ten minutes in the morning.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 早上公車每十分鐘來一班。

grammar.sentence: She never fights with her brother at home.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 她從不在家和弟弟吵架。

grammar.sentence: I am often tired after a long day of work.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 工作一整天後我經常很累。

grammar.sentence: Do you usually take a shower in the morning?
grammar.sentence_chinese: 你通常在早上淋浴嗎？

grammar.sentence: We often listen to music in the library.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我們經常在圖書館聽音樂。
